name: 1NSANE
post_apply_message:
1NSANE (2000, Codemasters, GOG, DRM-free) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34 (launch exe Game.exe).

WIDESCREEN — NEEDS A MOD YOU DROP IN. The engine lists widescreen resolutions but STRETCHES them from 4:3 unless patched. The fix is the community '1nsane widescreen mod' by Bayron/Black_Lotus (PCGamingWiki community files, mod #27): it only supports 16:9 and 16:10 (1280x800 works). Your GOG copy already includes Patch 2 (patch2.txt is present), which the mod requires.

To enable it: drop the mod's PATCH folder contents into the NAS local payload at
   Game Fixes/_recipes/1nsane/payload/widescreen/
then re-apply — the optional copy_files step overlays it onto the SD copy (originals backed up as .gfm-orig). Off-git on purpose, same as other sourced payloads. Until you add it, the game still runs, just 4:3-stretched.

CONTROLLER: native gamepad support — Steam Input's default layout works.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's GOG copy at NAS _games/1NSANE (goggame markers — DRM-free, delisted). Launch exe Game.exe (0.9MB); 'Language Setup.exe' is a setup tool. No resolution config on disk — settings generate in the prefix/registry on first run, and widescreen genuinely needs the Bayron widescreen mod (extract PATCH into game dir), not just a resolution set (native resolutions stretch from 4:3). So the widescreen step is an OPTIONAL BYO copy_files payload at payload/widescreen/ — Tony sources the mod, drops it in, re-applies. Patch 2 prerequisite already satisfied (patch2.txt present). Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED; widescreen inert until the mod payload is supplied.
